red.scratchpad: Focus on infantry frontline near x=22 cover; keep mortar behind the same cover. Use mbt to intercept enemy tanks and protect infantry. Limit drones to 1 for early scouting, avoid early loss. Medics stay with infantry to heal when HP drops. Prioritize killing opponent mbt early with infantry and mortar. Keep units near the center to control the middle lane.

blue.scratchpad: Observation: enemy massed infantry still dominate; our tanks survived longer but were overwhelmed due to lack of early engagement. Mortars performed well but died quickly; need to position them behind x=22 or x=41 cover. Medics died early; keep them protected behind allies. Drones gave good vision but rarely attacked; use them to harass and gather intel. Plan: keep 6 mbt for durability, 9 infantry for DPS, 6 mortar for sustained fire, 3 medic for frontline support, 3 drone for vision and harassment. Adjust positioning to stay behind obstacles when possible.
